ValidationRule.description: Ensures that each school record is limited to a single associated account.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000001rqxt') /* System Admin */, ISCHANGED(LOGIC_associated_accounts__c), LOGIC_associated_accounts__c > 1, NOT(PRIORVALUE(LOGIC_associated_accounts__c) > 1) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This school record already has an associated account. A school record can only be linked to one account.
